title: Summary: Turn 903
content: P1 of ObsidianExportService completed: interface, implementation (384 lines), test (287 lines). Vault structure: _notions, _relations, Uncategorized/, Category/ subfolders, _index.md per category. Features: bidirectional wiki-links, duplicate removal, sanitized filenames, YAML front matter, Java 1.8 compatible. 9 test cases covering empty, uncategorized, categorized, subcategory, relations, references, comments, filename sanitization, null path. Ready for P2 CLI integration.
